content: I’m an IT Support professional with a passion for building reliable systems and solving technical problems that impact real users. I work across Windows, macOS, and Linux environments, providing troubleshooting, system support, documentation, and access management to keep technology running smoothly. I bring a structured, reliability-first mindset to IT—focused on security, uptime, and clear communication. Currently, I’m expanding my skills in IT administration and networking, with a long-term goal of working in infrastructure and network engineering roles where stability, performance, and precision matter most.
title: About Page
